title: Yance Ford Made ‘Strong Island’ to Face Down the Past | The Big Picture (Ep. 50)
format: Sean sits down with Oscar-nominated director Yance Ford to talk through the decade it took to make Strong Island, a documentary about his brother's 1992 murder.

films.title: Strong Island
films.note: Ford's Oscar-nominated documentary about the 1992 murder of his brother William and the broken case that followed. Ten years in the making; he left his job at PBS's POV in 2012 to finish it full time.

films.title: When We Were Kings
films.note: Leon Gast's documentary on the 1974 Ali-Foreman fight in Kinshasa. Ford's answer to the show's closing question, having just seen a 35mm restoration at the Museum of the Moving Image.
